table.name: Next page
table.description: Navigates to the page immediately after the current page. It’s disabled on the last page.

table.name: Page
table.description: A page is a single view of a fixed subset of items within a larger dataset.

table.name: Elipsis
table.description: Indicates hidden pages when the total number of pages is large. It appears when there is a gap of more than one page between the active page and the first or last page.

table.name: First and last page
table.description: The first and last pages of the list are always visible.

table.name: Previous page
table.description: Navigates to the page immediately before the current page. It’s disabled on the first page.
